# AgentDbg

> Local-first debugger for AI agents. Trace runs, inspect LLM/tool calls, and stop runaway loops with guardrails.

## Canonical URLs
- Homepage: https://agentdbg.com/
- Guardrails: https://agentdbg.com/guardrails
- Integrations: https://agentdbg.com/integrations/
- Blog index: https://agentdbg.com/blog/

## Product docs
- Getting started: https://github.com/AgentDbg/AgentDbg/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md
- Guardrails docs: https://github.com/AgentDbg/AgentDbg/blob/main/docs/guardrails.md
- Integrations docs: https://github.com/AgentDbg/AgentDbg/blob/main/docs/integrations.md

## Selected blog posts
- AgentDbg Architecture Deep-Dive: How It Works Under the Hood: https://agentdbg.com/blog/architecture-deep-dive
- AgentDbg Event Schema Reference: Complete Technical Specification: https://agentdbg.com/blog/event-schema-reference

- AgentDbg Security & Privacy Guide: Protecting Sensitive Data: https://agentdbg.com/blog/security-privacy-guide
- Multi-Agent Debugging: Why Traditional Methods Fail: https://agentdbg.com/blog/multi-agent-debugging-why-traditional-methods-fail
- Agent Testing: Complete QA Framework for AI Systems: https://agentdbg.com/blog/agent-testing-complete-qa-framework
- Debugging Prompt Injection Attacks in AI Agents: Complete Security Guide: https://agentdbg.com/blog/debugging-prompt-injection-attacks-in-ai-agents
- Debugging Prompt Injection Attacks in AI Agents: Complete Security Guide: https://agentdbg.com/blog/debugging-prompt-injection-attacks
- Unit Testing AI Agents with AgentDbg: Complete Guide: https://agentdbg.com/blog/unit-testing-ai-agents-with-agentdbg-complete-guide
